name: Blood, Sweat, and Tears
descs:
Skills deal +10% damage to Staggered enemies.

If the Skill inflicts Tremor Potency, Tremor Count, triggers Amplitude Conversion, Tremor Burst, or Amplitude Entanglement, or if the Skill's Affinity was Sloth, deal +20% damage instead.

Skills deal <style="upgradeHighlight">+12.5% damage</style> to Staggered enemies.

If the Skill inflicts Tremor Potency, Tremor Count, triggers Amplitude Conversion, Tremor Burst, or Amplitude Entanglement, or if the Skill's Affinity was Sloth, deal <style="upgradeHighlight">+25% damage</style> instead.

Skills deal <style="upgradeHighlight">+15% damage</style> to Staggered enemies.

If the Skill inflicts Tremor Potency, Tremor Count, triggers Amplitude Conversion, Tremor Burst, or Amplitude Entanglement, or if the Skill's Affinity was Sloth, deal <style="upgradeHighlight">+30% damage</style> instead.
